=🏢 *FUNIL CAPTURA - META ADS*
Período: {{ $json.atual.min_data }} a {{ $json.atual.max_data }} ({{ $('CAPTURA').item.json.dias }} dias) | Comparativo com {{ $json.anterior.min_data }} a {{ $json.anterior.max_data }}

Gargalo: 🦆 | Está bom: 🦅
*Distribuição*
• Impressões: {{ $json.atual.impressoes.format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.impressoes.icone }} {{ $json.comparativo.impressoes.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}%
• Cliques: {{ $json.atual.cliques.format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.cliques.icone }} {{ $json.comparativo.cliques.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}%
• CTR: {{ $json.atual.ctr.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}% | {{ $json.comparativo.ctr.icone }} {{ $json.comparativo.ctr.variacao_pp.round(1).format('pt-BR') }} pp ({{ $json.atual.ctr>1?"🦅":"🦆" }})

*Conversão do Página*
• Visitas na página: {{ $json.atual.visitas_pagina.format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.visitas_pagina.icone }} {{ $json.comparativo.visitas_pagina.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}%
• Connect Rate: {{ $json.atual.connect_rate.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}% | {{ $json.comparativo.connect_rate.icone }} {{ $json.comparativo.connect_rate.variacao_pp.round(1).format('pt-BR') }} pp
• Conversão LP: {{ $json.atual.conversao_lp.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}% | {{ $json.comparativo.conversao_lp.icone }} {{ $json.comparativo.conversao_lp.variacao_pp.round(1).format('pt-BR') }} pp

*Conversão Forms*
• Conversão Forms: {{ $json.atual.conversao_forms.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}% | {{ $json.comparativo.conversao_forms.icone }} {{ $json.comparativo.conversao_forms.variacao_pp.round(1).format('pt-BR') }} pp ({{ $json.atual.conversao_forms>20?"🦅":"🦆" }})
• Leads: {{ $json.atual.leads.format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.leads.icone }} {{ $json.comparativo.leads.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}%
• Custo por Lead: R$ {{ $json.atual.custo_por_lead.round(1).format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.custo_por_lead.icone }} {{ $json.comparativo.custo_por_lead.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}% ({{ $json.atual.custo_por_lead<30?"🦅":"🦆" }})

*Financeiro*
• CPC: R$ {{ $json.atual.cpc.round(1).format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.cpc.icone }} {{ $json.comparativo.cpc.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}% ({{ $json.atual.cpc<3?"🦅":"🦆" }})
• CPM: R$ {{ $json.atual.cpm.round(1).format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.cpm.icone }} {{ $json.comparativo.cpm.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}% ({{ $json.atual.cpm<40?"🦅":"🦆" }})
• Investimento: R$ {{ $json.atual.investimento.round(0).format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.investimento.icone }} {{ $json.comparativo.investimento.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}%

parameters.query:
WITH periodos AS (

    SELECT
        'atual' AS tempo,
        CURDATE() - INTERVAL {{$json.dias}} DAY AS data_inicio,
        CURDATE() - INTERVAL 1 DAY AS data_fim

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        'anterior' AS tempo,
        CURDATE() - INTERVAL {{ Number($json.dias) * 2 }} DAY AS data_inicio,
        CURDATE() - INTERVAL {{ Number($json.dias) + 1 }} DAY AS data_fim

),

meta AS (

    SELECT
        p.tempo,

        MIN(m.`Data`) AS min_data,
        MAX(m.`Data`) AS max_data,

        ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(m.spend),0),2) AS investimento,

        COALESCE(SUM(m.impressions),0) AS impressoes,
        COALESCE(SUM(m.link_click),0) AS cliques,
        COALESCE(SUM(m.clicks_all),0) AS clicks_all,
        COALESCE(SUM(m.landing_page_view),0) AS visitas_pagina,
        COALESCE(SUM(m.lead_all),0) AS leads,

        ROUND(
            COALESCE(
                SUM(m.link_click) /
                NULLIF(SUM(m.impressions),0) * 100,
                0
            ),
            2
        ) AS ctr,

        ROUND(
            COALESCE(
                SUM(m.spend) /
                NULLIF(SUM(m.link_click),0),
                0
            ),
            2
        ) AS cpc,

        ROUND(
            COALESCE(
                SUM(m.spend) /
                NULLIF(SUM(m.impressions),0) * 1000,
                0
            ),
            2
        ) AS cpm,

        ROUND(
            COALESCE(
                SUM(m.landing_page_view) /
                NULLIF(SUM(m.link_click),0) * 100,
                0
            ),
            2
        ) AS connect_rate,

        ROUND(
            COALESCE(
                SUM(m.lead_all) /
                NULLIF(SUM(m.landing_page_view),0) * 100,
                0
            ),
            2
        ) AS conversao_lp,

        ROUND(
            COALESCE(
                SUM(m.lead_all) /
                NULLIF(SUM(m.link_click),0) * 100,
                0
            ),
            2
        ) AS conversao_forms,

        ROUND(
            COALESCE(
                SUM(m.spend) /
                NULLIF(SUM(m.lead_all),0),
                0
            ),
            2
        ) AS custo_por_lead

    FROM periodos p

    LEFT JOIN {{$json.db_name}}.mc_ctx_ls_{{$json.db_name}} m
        ON DATE(m.`Data`) BETWEEN p.data_inicio AND p.data_fim
       AND m.campaign_name LIKE '%{{$json.campaign_name}}%'

    GROUP BY
        p.tempo

)

SELECT
    p.tempo,

    m.min_data,
    m.max_data,

    m.investimento,
    m.impressoes,
    m.cliques,
    m.clicks_all,
    m.visitas_pagina,
    m.leads,

    m.ctr,
    m.cpc,
    m.cpm,

    m.connect_rate,
    m.conversao_lp,
    m.conversao_forms,
    m.custo_por_lead

FROM periodos p

LEFT JOIN meta m
    ON m.tempo = p.tempo

ORDER BY
    FIELD(p.tempo,'atual','anterior');

parameters.name: query
parameters.value:
=SELECT
  campaign.id,
  campaign.name,

  metrics.cost_micros,
  metrics.impressions,
  metrics.average_cpm,
  metrics.ctr,
  metrics.clicks,
  metrics.average_cpc,

  metrics.conversions,
  metrics.all_conversions,

  metrics.conversions_value,
  metrics.all_conversions_value

FROM campaign

WHERE segments.date BETWEEN '{{ $json.start_date }}' AND '{{ $json.end_date }}'
  AND metrics.cost_micros > 0

  metrics.impressions,
  metrics.average_cpm,

  metrics.clicks,
  metrics.average_cpc,

  metrics.conversions_value,
  metrics.all_conversions_value

FROM campaign

WHERE

  AND '{{ $json.end_date.toDateTime().minus(7,'days').format('yyyy-MM-dd') }}'
  AND metrics.cost_micros > 0

assignments.value:
=📣 *DISTRIBUIÇÃO*
Período: {{ $json.atual.inicio }} a {{ $json.atual.fim }} ({{ $('DISTRIBUICAO').item.json.dias }} dias) | Comparativo com {{ $json?.anterior?.inicio || "" }} a {{ $json?.anterior?.fim || "" }}


Gargalo: 🦆 | Está bom: 🦅
• Impressões: {{ $json.atual.impressoes.toNumber().format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.impressoes.icone }}{{ $json.comparativo.impressoes.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}%
• Alcance: {{ $json.atual.alcance.toNumber().format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.alcance.icone }}{{ $json.comparativo.alcance.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}%
• CTR: {{ $json.atual.ctr.toNumber().round(1).format('pt-BR') }}% | {{ $json.comparativo.ctr.icone }}{{ $json.comparativo.ctr.variacao_pp.round(1).format('pt-BR') }} pp ({{ $json.atual.ctr.toNumber()>2?"🦅":"🦆" }})

*Vídeo*
• Vídeos 95%: {{ $json.atual.video_p95.toNumber().format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.video_p95.icone }}{{ $json.comparativo.video_p95.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}%
• CPV 95%: R$ {{ $json.atual.cpv95.round(2).format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.cpv95.icone }}{{ $json.comparativo.cpv95.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}% ({{ $json.atual.cpv95<0.10?"🦅":"🦆" }})

*Engajamento*
• Cliques: {{ $json.atual.cliques.toNumber().format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.cliques.icone }}{{ $json.comparativo.cliques.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}%
• Posts CSS: {{ $json.atual.post_css.toNumber().format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.post_css.icone }}{{ $json.comparativo.post_css.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}%
• Engajamentos: {{ $json.atual.post_engagement.toNumber().format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.post_engagement.icone }}{{ $json.comparativo.post_engagement.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}%

*Financeiro*
• CPC: R$ {{ $json.atual.cpc.round(1).format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.cpc.icone }}{{ $json.comparativo.cpc.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}% ({{ $json.atual.cpc<1?"🦅":"🦆" }})
• Investimento: R$ {{ $json.atual.investimento.round(0).format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.investimento.icone }}{{ $json.comparativo.investimento.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}%

parameters.query:
WITH parametros AS (
    SELECT
        DATE('{{ $json.data_feedback }}') AS data_fim,
        {{ $json.dias }} AS dias
),

periodos AS (

    SELECT
        'atual' AS periodo,
        DATE_SUB(data_fim, INTERVAL dias-1 DAY) AS inicio,
        data_fim AS fim
    FROM parametros

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        'anterior',
        DATE_SUB(data_fim, INTERVAL (dias*2)-1 DAY),
        DATE_SUB(data_fim, INTERVAL dias DAY)
    FROM parametros

),

ads AS (

    SELECT
        p.periodo,
        p.inicio,
        p.fim,

        ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(a.spend),0),2) AS investimento,
        COALESCE(SUM(a.impressions),0) AS impressoes,
        COALESCE(SUM(a.reach),0) AS alcance,
        COALESCE(SUM(a.link_click),0) AS cliques,
        COALESCE(SUM(a.landing_page_view),0) AS landing_page_view,
        COALESCE(SUM(a.post_engagement),0) AS post_engagement,
        COALESCE(SUM(a.post_save),0) AS post_save,
        COALESCE(SUM(a.post_reaction),0) AS post_reaction,
        COALESCE(SUM(a.post_comment),0) AS post_comment,
        COALESCE(SUM(a.post_like),0) AS post_like,
        COALESCE(SUM(a.post),0) AS post,
        COALESCE(SUM(a.video_p95_watched),0) AS video_p95,

        ROUND(
            COALESCE(
                SUM(a.spend) /
                NULLIF(SUM(a.video_p95_watched),0),
                0
            ),
            2
        ) AS cpv95,

        COALESCE(SUM(a.post_save),0)
            + COALESCE(SUM(a.post_reaction),0)
            + COALESCE(SUM(a.post_comment),0)
            + COALESCE(SUM(a.post_like),0)
            + COALESCE(SUM(a.post),0) AS post_css,

        ROUND(
            COALESCE(
                SUM(a.link_click) /
                NULLIF(SUM(a.impressions),0) * 100,
                0
            ),
            2
        ) AS ctr,

        ROUND(
            COALESCE(
                SUM(a.spend) /
                NULLIF(SUM(a.link_click),0),
                0
            ),
            2
        ) AS cpc,

        ROUND(
            COALESCE(
                SUM(a.landing_page_view) /
                NULLIF(SUM(a.link_click),0) * 100,
                0
            ),
            2
        ) AS connect_rate

    FROM periodos p

    JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_ctx_ls_{{ $json.db_name }} a
        ON DATE(a.`Data`) BETWEEN p.inicio AND p.fim
       AND a.campaign_name LIKE '%DISTRIBUICAO%'

    GROUP BY
        p.periodo,
        p.inicio,
        p.fim

),

mensal AS (

    SELECT
        p.periodo,

        ROUND(
            COALESCE(SUM(a.spend),0),
            2
        ) AS investimento_mes

    FROM periodos p

    JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_ctx_ls_{{ $json.db_name }} a
        ON DATE(a.`Data`) BETWEEN
            DATE_FORMAT(p.inicio,'%Y-%m-01')
            AND LAST_DAY(p.inicio)
       AND a.campaign_name LIKE '%DISTRIBUICAO%'

    GROUP BY
        p.periodo

)

SELECT

    a.periodo,
    a.inicio,
    a.fim,

    a.investimento,
    m.investimento_mes,

    a.impressoes,
    a.alcance,
    a.cliques,
    a.landing_page_view,
    a.post_engagement,
    a.post_css,
    a.video_p95,

    a.ctr,
    a.cpv95,
    a.cpc,
    a.connect_rate

FROM ads a

LEFT JOIN mensal m
    ON m.periodo = a.periodo

ORDER BY
    FIELD(a.periodo,'atual','anterior');

WITH periodos AS (

    SELECT
        'atual' AS tempo,
        CURDATE() - INTERVAL {{$json.dias}} DAY AS data_inicio,
        CURDATE() - INTERVAL 1 DAY AS data_fim

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        'anterior' AS tempo,
        CURDATE() - INTERVAL {{ Number($json.dias) * 2 }} DAY AS data_inicio,
        CURDATE() - INTERVAL {{ Number($json.dias) + 1 }} DAY AS data_fim

),

meta AS (

    SELECT
        p.tempo,

        MIN(m.`Data`) AS min_data,
        MAX(m.`Data`) AS max_data,

        ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(m.spend),0),2) AS investimento,

        COALESCE(SUM(m.impressions),0) AS impressoes,
        COALESCE(SUM(m.link_click),0) AS cliques,
        COALESCE(SUM(m.clicks_all),0) AS clicks_all,
        COALESCE(SUM(m.landing_page_view),0) AS visitas_pagina,
        COALESCE(SUM(m.lead_all),0) AS leads,

        ROUND(
            COALESCE(
                SUM(m.link_click) /
                NULLIF(SUM(m.impressions),0) * 100,
                0
            ),
            2
        ) AS ctr,

        ROUND(
            COALESCE(
                SUM(m.spend) /
                NULLIF(SUM(m.link_click),0),
                0
            ),
            2
        ) AS cpc,

        ROUND(
            COALESCE(
                SUM(m.spend) /
                NULLIF(SUM(m.impressions),0) * 1000,
                0
            ),
            2
        ) AS cpm,

        ROUND(
            COALESCE(
                SUM(m.landing_page_view) /
                NULLIF(SUM(m.link_click),0) * 100,
                0
            ),
            2
        ) AS connect_rate,

        ROUND(
            COALESCE(
                SUM(m.lead_all) /
                NULLIF(SUM(m.landing_page_view),0) * 100,
                0
            ),
            2
        ) AS conversao_lp,

        ROUND(
            COALESCE(
                SUM(m.lead_all) /
                NULLIF(SUM(m.link_click),0) * 100,
                0
            ),
            2
        ) AS conversao_forms,

        ROUND(
            COALESCE(
                SUM(m.spend) /
                NULLIF(SUM(m.lead_all),0),
                0
            ),
            2
        ) AS custo_por_lead

    FROM periodos p

    LEFT JOIN {{$json.db_name}}.mc_ctx_ls_{{$json.db_name}} m
        ON DATE(m.`Data`) BETWEEN p.data_inicio AND p.data_fim
       AND m.campaign_name LIKE '%{{$json.campaign_name}}%'

    GROUP BY
        p.tempo

)

SELECT
    p.tempo,

    m.min_data,
    m.max_data,

    m.investimento,
    m.impressoes,
    m.cliques,
    m.clicks_all,
    m.visitas_pagina,
    m.leads,

    m.ctr,
    m.cpc,
    m.cpm,

    m.connect_rate,
    m.conversao_lp,
    m.conversao_forms,
    m.custo_por_lead

FROM periodos p

LEFT JOIN meta m
    ON m.tempo = p.tempo

ORDER BY
    FIELD(p.tempo,'atual','anterior');

• Vídeos 95%: {{ $json.atual.video_p95.toNumber().format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.video_p95.icone }}{{ $json.comparativo.video_p95.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}%
• CPV 95%: R$ {{ $json.atual.cpv95.round(2).format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.cpv95.icone }}{{ $json.comparativo.cpv95.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}% ({{ $json.atual.cpv95<0.10?"🦅":"🦆" }})

*Engajamento*
• Cliques: {{ $json.atual.cliques.toNumber().format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.cliques.icone }}{{ $json.comparativo.cliques.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}%
• Posts CSS: {{ $json.atual.post_css.toNumber().format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.post_css.icone }}{{ $json.comparativo.post_css.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}%
• Engajamentos: {{ $json.atual.post_engagement.toNumber().format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.post_engagement.icone }}{{ $json.comparativo.post_engagement.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}%

*Financeiro*
• CPC: R$ {{ $json.atual.cpc.round(1).format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.cpc.icone }}{{ $json.comparativo.cpc.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}% ({{ $json.atual.cpc<1?"🦅":"🦆" }})
• Investimento: R$ {{ $json.atual.investimento.round(0).format('pt-BR') }} | {{ $json.comparativo.investimento.icone }}{{ $json.comparativo.investimento.variacao.round(1).format('pt-BR') }}%

parameters.query:
WITH parametros AS (
    SELECT
        DATE('{{ $json.data_feedback }}') AS data_fim,
        {{ $json.dias }} AS dias
),

periodos AS (

    SELECT
        'atual' AS periodo,
        DATE_SUB(data_fim, INTERVAL dias-1 DAY) AS inicio,
        data_fim AS fim
    FROM parametros

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        'anterior',
        DATE_SUB(data_fim, INTERVAL (dias*2)-1 DAY),
        DATE_SUB(data_fim, INTERVAL dias DAY)
    FROM parametros

),

ads AS (

    SELECT
        p.periodo,
        p.inicio,
        p.fim,

        ROUND(COALESCE(SUM(a.spend),0),2) AS investimento,
        COALESCE(SUM(a.impressions),0) AS impressoes,
        COALESCE(SUM(a.reach),0) AS alcance,
        COALESCE(SUM(a.link_click),0) AS cliques,
        COALESCE(SUM(a.landing_page_view),0) AS landing_page_view,
        COALESCE(SUM(a.post_engagement),0) AS post_engagement,
        COALESCE(SUM(a.post_save),0) AS post_save,
        COALESCE(SUM(a.post_reaction),0) AS post_reaction,
        COALESCE(SUM(a.post_comment),0) AS post_comment,
        COALESCE(SUM(a.post_like),0) AS post_like,
        COALESCE(SUM(a.post),0) AS post,
        COALESCE(SUM(a.video_p95_watched),0) AS video_p95,

        ROUND(
            COALESCE(
                SUM(a.spend) /
                NULLIF(SUM(a.video_p95_watched),0),
                0
            ),
            2
        ) AS cpv95,

        COALESCE(SUM(a.post_save),0)
            + COALESCE(SUM(a.post_reaction),0)
            + COALESCE(SUM(a.post_comment),0)
            + COALESCE(SUM(a.post_like),0)
            + COALESCE(SUM(a.post),0) AS post_css,

        ROUND(
            COALESCE(
                SUM(a.link_click) /
                NULLIF(SUM(a.impressions),0) * 100,
                0
            ),
            2
        ) AS ctr,

        ROUND(
            COALESCE(
                SUM(a.spend) /
                NULLIF(SUM(a.link_click),0),
                0
            ),
            2
        ) AS cpc,

        ROUND(
            COALESCE(
                SUM(a.landing_page_view) /
                NULLIF(SUM(a.link_click),0) * 100,
                0
            ),
            2
        ) AS connect_rate

    FROM periodos p

    JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_ctx_ls_{{ $json.db_name }} a
        ON DATE(a.`Data`) BETWEEN p.inicio AND p.fim
       AND a.campaign_name LIKE '%DISTRIBUICAO%'

    GROUP BY
        p.periodo,
        p.inicio,
        p.fim

),

mensal AS (

    SELECT
        p.periodo,

        ROUND(
            COALESCE(SUM(a.spend),0),
            2
        ) AS investimento_mes

    FROM periodos p

    JOIN {{ $json.db_name }}.mc_ctx_ls_{{ $json.db_name }} a
        ON DATE(a.`Data`) BETWEEN
            DATE_FORMAT(p.inicio,'%Y-%m-01')
            AND LAST_DAY(p.inicio)
       AND a.campaign_name LIKE '%DISTRIBUICAO%'

    GROUP BY
        p.periodo

)

SELECT

    a.periodo,
    a.inicio,
    a.fim,

    a.investimento,
    m.investimento_mes,

    a.impressoes,
    a.alcance,
    a.cliques,
    a.landing_page_view,
    a.post_engagement,
    a.post_css,
    a.video_p95,

    a.ctr,
    a.cpv95,
    a.cpc,
    a.connect_rate

FROM ads a

LEFT JOIN mensal m
    ON m.periodo = a.periodo

ORDER BY
    FIELD(a.periodo,'atual','anterior');
